title: Wrap hand-rolled CLI (PlayCua)

verification_result.notes: All 2 unit tests pass: cli_parses_subcommands verifies run/test/build subcommand parsing; run_subcommand_prints_placeholder verifies CliRunnable::run succeeds for the Run command. Compilation of pheno-cli-base path dep + playcua-cli-wrapper succeeds (Finished `test` profile in 18.62s).

summary: Created standalone crates/cli-wrapper crate (playcua-cli-wrapper) with path dependency to pheno-cli-base (../../../pheno-cli-base).
Implemented PlayCuaCli struct deriving clap::Parser with subcommands: run, test, build.
Implemented CliRunnable for PlayCuaCli using the pheno-cli-base pattern; run subcommand prints a placeholder.
Added stub pheno-cli-base crate (Cargo.toml + src/lib.rs with CliRunnable trait) since it existed as a repo stub with no source code.
notes: pheno-cli-base existed as a repo stub with no Cargo.toml or src; created minimal stub crate with CliRunnable trait and anyhow dependency.
cli-wrapper is a standalone crate (not part of the PlayCua workspace) per task specification ([workspace] marker disables workspace inheritance).
Commit: feat(playcua-cli): wrap hand-rolled CLI with pheno-cli-base (L4 #73) (b7f70b0).
Branch not pushed per task instructions.
